tags.name: hp-bond
tags.description:
Shared-edge bond indicator between two axially-adjacent hexes.
Small filled hex dot at the shared edge midpoint; fades to a
hairline once the bond settles.

attributes.name: state
attributes.description: `forming` (default, full visibility) or `settled` (hairline).

tags.name: hp-link-node
tags.description: Endpoint dot for hp-tether arcs. Tiny filled marker.

attributes.name: bonded
attributes.description: When set, the node is bonded to at least one arc-link and fills with `secondary`.

tags.name: hp-button
tags.description:
Button primitive — composes hp-cell variant="action" with the
semantics consumers expect from a button: role="button",
auto-tabindex, Enter / Space activate, disabled blocks clicks,
type="submit" drives form.requestSubmit() inside a form.

attributes.name: type
attributes.description:
Native button type. Determines submit / reset behaviour inside a
`<form>`. Default `button` (inert in forms).

attributes.name: disabled
attributes.description:
When set, the button doesn't activate on click / Enter / Space
and is removed from the tab order. Visual state inherits hp-
cell's stroke at the disabled opacity.

attributes.name: filled
attributes.description:
High-emphasis filled CTA — forwards `filled` to the composed
hp-cell.

attributes.name: size
attributes.description:
Cell size.

- `xxs` (20px) — dense / tabular controls (e.g. inline icon
buttons in a table row)
- `xs` (32px) — comfortable form-control sized buttons (e.g.
hp-toggle-group, segmented controls)
- `sm` (100px, default) — full content / CTA size
- `md` (180px) — feature-tile button
- `lg` (320px) — hero / landing tile

tags.name: hp-checkbox
tags.description:
Hex checkbox. role="checkbox", aria-checked reflects state
(true / false / mixed). Space toggles; disabled blocks.

attributes.name: checked
attributes.description: Current checked state. Toggled on click / Space.

attributes.name: indeterminate
attributes.description:
Indeterminate (mixed) state — visual is a horizontal bar
instead of a check. Sets aria-checked="mixed" for assistive
tech. Cleared on next user toggle.

attributes.name: disabled
attributes.description: Disabled — blocks toggle and removes from tab order.

attributes.name: name
attributes.description:
Optional name for form integration (not yet wired to the form
submission API; placeholder for forthcoming hp-form integration).

attributes.name: value
attributes.description: Optional value (paired with name) for form integration.

attributes.name: size
attributes.description:
Cell size. `xs` (default, 32px) is the comfortable form-input
size; `xxs` (20px) is dense / tabular; `sm` (100px) is the
content-hex size — rarely useful here but available.

tags.name: hp-form
tags.description:
Form container — thin wrapper around the native <form> with
consistent gap + label / input alignment. Stub.

attributes.name: method
attributes.description: HTTP method for native submission. Default `post`.

attributes.name: action
attributes.description: Submission endpoint.

attributes.name: name
attributes.description: Optional form name.

attributes.name: no-validate
attributes.description: Skip browser native validation when set — let custom JS handle it.

tags.name: hp-label
tags.description:
Form label primitive — wraps a native <label> with consistent
styling and the `for` forwarding, plus optional required / optional
markers.

attributes.name: for
attributes.description:
ID of the input this label targets. Forwarded to the inner
`<label>`'s `for` attribute — clicking the label focuses /
toggles the linked input. Maps to the `for` HTML attribute.

attributes.name: required
attributes.description:
Append a "*" required marker after the label text. Stamps
aria-required on the linked input is the consumer's job — this
is the visual cue only.

attributes.name: optional
attributes.description: Append a muted "(optional)" hint after the label text.

tags.name: hp-radio-group
tags.description:
Radio group container. Manages selection across slotted hp-radio
children — arrow keys move focus + selection between siblings,
Home / End jump to first / last, only one child checked at a
time. role="radiogroup".

attributes.name: value
attributes.description:
Currently selected radio value. Setting this checks the matching
child; clearing it unchecks all.

attributes.name: disabled
attributes.description: Disable the entire group — every child reads as disabled.

attributes.name: orientation
attributes.description:
Orientation — controls arrow-key direction. `horizontal` moves
with ArrowLeft/Right; `vertical` (default) with ArrowUp/Down.

attributes.name: name
attributes.description: Optional form name (placeholder for forthcoming hp-form wiring).

tags.name: hp-radio
tags.description:
Single radio option. Pairs with hp-radio-group as a parent.
role="radio", aria-checked reflects state; emits hp-radio-select
on click / Space / Enter for the group to track.

attributes.name: value
attributes.description:
Value emitted when this radio is selected. Required for the
parent hp-radio-group to track selection.

attributes.name: checked
attributes.description:
Selected state. Set by the parent hp-radio-group; consumers
shouldn't write directly — use the group's `value` instead.

attributes.name: disabled
attributes.description: Disabled — blocks selection, removes from tab order.

attributes.name: size
attributes.description:
Cell size. `xs` (default, 32px) is the comfortable form-input
size; `xxs` (20px) is dense / tabular; `sm` (100px) is the
content-hex size — rarely useful here but available.

tags.name: hp-select
tags.description:
Custom listbox select — trigger button + popover list of options.
role="combobox" on the trigger, role="listbox" on the popover,
role="option" on each child.

attributes.name: value
attributes.description:
Currently selected value. Setting programmatically activates
the matching option (or empty when no match).

attributes.name: placeholder
attributes.description: Placeholder shown on the trigger when no value is selected.

attributes.name: disabled
attributes.description: Disabled — blocks toggle and removes from tab order.

attributes.name: name
attributes.description: Optional form name.

tags.name: hp-option
tags.description:
Single option inside hp-select. role="option"; Enter / Space
activate; emits hp-option-select.

attributes.name: value
attributes.description: Value emitted to the parent hp-select.

attributes.name: selected
attributes.description: Selected — auto-set by parent hp-select.

attributes.name: disabled
attributes.description: Disabled — blocks activation.

tags.name: hp-slider
tags.description:
Single-thumb continuous-value slider. role="slider";
aria-valuemin / max / now reflect state. Arrow keys step by `step`,
PageUp/PageDown by 10×, Home/End jump to min/max. Pointer drag
with capture.

attributes.name: min
attributes.description: Lower bound (default 0).

attributes.name: max
attributes.description: Upper bound (default 100).

attributes.name: step
attributes.description: Step size for arrow keys / pointer drag (default 1).

attributes.name: value
attributes.description: Current value. Clamped to [min, max] on set.

attributes.name: disabled
attributes.description: Disabled — no input, removed from tab order.

attributes.name: name
attributes.description: Optional form name (placeholder for hp-form).

tags.name: hp-toggle-group
tags.description:
Group of toggle buttons with single or multi-select semantics.
Slotted children carry `value` attributes; the group tracks
`value` (string for single, space-separated for multiple) and
stamps aria-pressed on each pressed child.

attributes.name: type
attributes.description:
Selection model. `single` allows one button pressed at a time
(toggling on a different button unpresses the previous one).
`multiple` allows any combination.

attributes.name: value
orientation
attributes.description:
Layout direction — also drives the honeycomb zigzag direction
when `layout="honeycomb"`.

attributes.name: layout
attributes.description:
Visual arrangement.

- `flex` (default) — children laid out as inline-flex with a
standard row / column.
- `honeycomb` — children positioned in a hex-grid zigzag.
Subsequent items add to the right (orientation=horizontal)
or alternate bottom-right / bottom-left (orientation=vertical).
Each adjacent pair shares an edge with hp-grid's stroke-overlap
correction so the strokes coincide into a single line.

attributes.name: disabled
attributes.description: Disable the entire group.

tags.name: hp-toggle
tags.description:
Two-state on/off switch. role="switch", aria-checked reflects
state; Space / Enter activate; disabled blocks.

attributes.name: checked
attributes.description: On (checked) state.

attributes.name: disabled
attributes.description: Disabled — no activation, removed from tab order.

attributes.name: name
attributes.description: Optional form name (placeholder for forthcoming hp-form wiring).

attributes.name: value
attributes.description: Submitted value when checked.

tags.name: hp-avatar
tags.description:
Hex-shaped avatar. Image clips into the hex; falls back to the
slotted content (typically initials) on load error or before src
resolves.

attributes.name: src
attributes.description:
Image URL. When set, the image renders inside the hex. On load
error or while pending, the slotted fallback shows instead.

attributes.name: alt
attributes.description: Alt text for the image. Required for non-decorative avatars.

attributes.name: size
attributes.description: Avatar size — matches hp-hex sizes.

tags.name: hp-icon
tags.description:
SVG icon wrapper — sized via `size` (sm / md / lg), strokes inherit
`currentColor`.

attributes.name: size
attributes.description: Icon size — `sm` (16px), `md` (default, 20px), or `lg` (24px).

tags.name: hp-pixel
tags.description:
Pixel-art renderer. Draws a sequence of states (each a list of
[x, y, paletteIndex] pixels) on a fixed hex-clipped canvas;
configurable palette and per-state delay drive a sprite-like
animation loop.

attributes.name: art
attributes.description: Static ASCII grid. `#` = lit, `.` = empty, digits index into `palette`.

attributes.name: state
attributes.description: Current state when `.states` is set. Falls back to `"idle"`.

attributes.name: pixel-size
attributes.description: Pixel size in CSS px. Default `3`.

attributes.name: interactive
attributes.description:
Auto-swap to `hover` / `focus` / `active` named states on the
matching pseudo-classes. No JS state-flip required.

tags.name: hp-background
tags.description:
Pointer-aware hex grid backdrop. Faint SVG hex tiles that brighten
softly around the cursor. Positioned absolutely; drop inside any
positioned container.

attributes.name: hex-size
attributes.description:
Hex side length in pixels (centre-to-vertex). Smaller = denser
pattern. Default 14 — reads as ambient texture, not a focal
element.

attributes.name: pointer-radius
attributes.description:
Radius in pixels where the brighter strokes are fully visible
around the cursor. Falls to transparent at the edge. Default 200.

tags.name: hp-cluster
tags.description:
5-hex rosette layout — centre + 4 axial neighbours. Slotted
children with slot names (`centre`, `top`, `middle-left`,
`middle-right`, `bottom`) get positioned by axial offsets.

attributes.name: size
attributes.description: Cell size for the cluster — `sm` (default), `md`, or `lg`.

tags.name: hp-collapsible
tags.description:
Disclosure: trigger + collapsible content. Trigger toggles
`open`; content expands via a smooth grid-template-rows
transition. aria-expanded + aria-controls wire automatically.

attributes.name: open
attributes.description: Open / closed state. Reflects to the host.

attributes.name: disabled
attributes.description:
Disabled — blocks the trigger and removes it from the tab
order.

tags.name: hp-demo
tags.description:
Documentation example envelope. Hex-pattern preview area + code
area + Copy code button. Wraps each example on a component doc
page.

attributes.name: caption
attributes.description:
Optional caption shown above the demo (e.g., "Default", "Sizes",
"Active state"). Leave empty for a bare envelope.

attributes.name: no-copy
attributes.description: Suppress the Copy code button.

attributes.name: no-theme-toggle
attributes.description: Suppress the per-demo theme toggle.

tags.name: hp-grid
tags.description:
Hex coordinate space — slotted children with q / r attributes are
positioned by CSS transforms. `draggable` opts into drag-to-move
and canvas pan; `tetherable` opts into drag-to-toggle hp-tether
arcs.

attributes.name: size
attributes.description: Cell size for the grid — `sm` (default `hex-cell-sm`), `md`, `lg`.

attributes.name: tetherable
attributes.description:
Opt into graph-editor semantics. When set, dropping a hex onto
another hex toggles an `<hp-tether>` arc between the two instead
of BFS-snapping to the nearest empty axial neighbour. The
source snaps back to its origin slot; the target stays put. A
tether is created if none exists between the pair (in either
direction); an existing tether is removed (toggle). Empty-cell
drops still move the hex normally. Consumers building layout
surfaces leave this off; consumers building graph / node
editors turn it on.

attributes.name: draggable
attributes.description:
Opt into drag / pan. When unset (default), the grid is static —
cells stay where they're authored and empty-space pointerdowns
do nothing. When set, all interactive cells become draggable
by default and empty-space drags pan the canvas. Per-cell
override via the cell's own `draggable` attribute: `draggable`
(presence) force-enables drag on that cell (useful for decorative
cells that would otherwise be static); `draggable="false"`
force-disables drag on that cell (useful for interactive cells
that should stay put).

tags.name: hp-scroll-area
tags.description:
Custom-scrollbar wrapper. Hides the native scrollbar inside and
paints a themed one on top. Native scroll model preserved.

attributes.name: visibility
attributes.description:
Scrollbar visibility:
- `auto` (default): visible whenever the content overflows
- `always`: persistently visible
- `hover`: only visible while the area is hovered

tags.name: hp-separator

attributes.name: orientation
attributes.description:
Layout direction. Horizontal is a row divider; vertical is a
column divider.

attributes.name: decorative
attributes.description:
When set, the separator is purely visual (role=presentation,
invisible to assistive tech). Default unset = role=separator.

attributes.name: mark
attributes.description:
Centre glyph. `hex` (default) reads as a small node on the
divider; `dot` is a tighter filled dot; `none` is a clean line.

tags.name: hp-sidebar-group
tags.description:
Collapsible nav section inside `<hp-sidebar>`. Children (typically
`<hp-sidebar-item>` and other `<hp-sidebar-group>`) are slotted
into the expanded panel.

attributes.name: label
attributes.description: Summary label text.

attributes.name: open
attributes.description: Whether the section is expanded. Reflects user toggles.

tags.name: hp-sidebar-item
tags.description:
Leaf navigation entry inside `<hp-sidebar>`. The slotted text
content is the visible label.

attributes.name: href
attributes.description: Destination URL.

attributes.name: active
attributes.description: Currently-active page; applies the active highlight.

tags.name: hp-sidebar
tags.description:
Navigation sidebar chrome. Compose with `<hp-sidebar-item>` leaves
and `<hp-sidebar-group>` collapsible sections.

attributes.name: variant
attributes.description:
Visual variant.

- `"primary"` (default): full chrome with a right border.
Intended as the page's main nav rail on the left.
- `"secondary"`: lighter chrome, no right border. Intended for
a right-rail table-of-contents or similar companion list.

tags.name: hp-toolbar
tags.description:
Toolbar container with managed keyboard navigation. Roving
tabindex over slotted focusable children; arrow keys move between
them; Home / End jump to first / last; Tab leaves the toolbar.

attributes.name: orientation
attributes.description: Layout direction — controls which arrow keys move focus.

tags.name: hp-progress

attributes.name: min
attributes.description: Lower bound. Default 0.

attributes.name: max
attributes.description: Upper bound. Default 100.

attributes.name: value
attributes.description:
Current value. Clamped to [min, max]. Ignored when
`indeterminate` is set.

attributes.name: indeterminate
attributes.description:
Indeterminate mode — animates a sliding ribbon, hides the
numeric value from assistive tech. Use when progress is
knowable but a specific number isn't available.

attributes.name: tone
attributes.description:
Semantic tone for the fill — neutral (primary), positive, warn,
alert, error.

tags.name: hp-spinner
tags.description:
Hexagonal-cluster spinner. A hollow cluster of small filled hexes
pulsing in a clockwise spiral. role="status" with
aria-label="Loading" by default.

attributes.name: size
attributes.description:
Cluster size — `sm` (7 hexes inline), `md` (19 hexes default),
`lg` (37 hexes full-page).

attributes.name: tone
attributes.description:
Semantic tone. Default `neutral` reads as --hp-primary ("system
busy"); others map to the matching tone stroke.

tags.name: hp-link
tags.description: Inline text link. Styled anchor with the hexpunk hue-swap.

attributes.name: href
attributes.description: Destination URL.

attributes.name: target
attributes.description:
Optional anchor target — `_blank`, `_self`, etc. When `_blank`,
`rel="noopener"` is appended automatically.

attributes.name: rel
attributes.description:
Optional `rel` override. With `target="_blank"` the component
defaults to `noopener` — set this prop to extend / override.

tags.name: hp-menubar

attributes.name: orientation
attributes.description: Layout direction — controls arrow-key axis.

tags.name: hp-navigation-menu
tags.description: Top-nav menu with optional hover-revealed submenus.

tags.name: hp-nav-item
tags.description:
Single item inside hp-navigation-menu. Plain link when no `content`
slot, dropdown trigger when there is one.

attributes.name: href
attributes.description:
Destination URL when no submenu is provided — turns the
trigger into a plain link.

tags.name: hp-tabs
tags.description:
Tabbed content container. Slotted hp-tab children render the tab
list; hp-tab-panel children render the panels. Arrow keys cycle
tabs; Home / End jump; roving tabindex. `route="hash"` syncs value
to URL hash.

attributes.name: value
attributes.description:
Selected tab value. Setting this activates the matching tab
and shows the matching panel. Default = first tab's value.

attributes.name: orientation
attributes.description:
Tab list orientation. Horizontal arrows = Left / Right;
vertical = Up / Down.

attributes.name: route
attributes.description:
Sync value with the URL.

- `"hash"`: reads / writes `location.hash`. Simple but collides
with any other consumer of the hash (e.g. heading anchors in
panel content, in-page TOC links). Best for standalone pages
where the hash is yours alone.
- `"query"`: reads / writes a search param (default `tab`, set
via `query-param` attribute). Leaves the hash free for in-page
anchors. Best for docs pages where panels contain headings
with their own slug anchors.

attributes.name: query-param
attributes.description: Search-param name used when `route="query"`. Defaults to `tab`.

tags.name: hp-tab
tags.description:
Single tab inside hp-tabs. role="tab"; auto-slotted into the
tablist via slot="tab" in connectedCallback.

tags.name: hp-tab-panel
tags.description:
Panel body inside hp-tabs. role="tabpanel"; visibility driven by
the parent hp-tabs via the `hidden` attribute.

tags.name: hp-banner

attributes.name: tone
attributes.description:
Semantic tone. `alert` / `error` upgrade role to "alert" for
assertive screen-reader announcement.

attributes.name: label
attributes.description: Optional uppercase header label (e.g. "Note", "Warning").

tags.name: hp-toast
tags.description:
Transient notification toast. Slides in, auto-dismisses after
`duration` ms (0 = sticky). `alert` / `error` tones upgrade
aria-live to assertive.

attributes.name: open
attributes.description: Open state — drives the slide-in animation.

attributes.name: tone
attributes.description:
Semantic tone. `alert` / `error` upgrade role to "alert" for
assertive screen-reader announcement.

attributes.name: duration
attributes.description:
Auto-dismiss after this many ms. 0 = sticky (manual close
only). Default 4000.

tags.name: hp-alert-dialog
tags.description:
Alert dialog — role="alertdialog" variant of hp-dialog. Requires
an explicit action; backdrop clicks don't dismiss. Use for
destructive confirmations and blocking errors.

attributes.name: open
attributes.description: Reflect open state. Setting `open` programmatically opens / closes.

tags.name: hp-context-menu
tags.description:
Context menu — right-click on the target region opens the menu at
the cursor.

tags.name: hp-dialog
tags.description:
Modal dialog backed by the native <dialog> + showModal(). Browser
focus trap + Escape dismiss + aria-modal. Backdrop click closes
by default — `no-backdrop-close` opts out.

attributes.name: open
attributes.description:
Reflect open state. Setting `open` programmatically calls
showModal(); clearing it calls close().

attributes.name: no-backdrop-close
attributes.description:
When set, clicking the backdrop doesn't close. Use for
destructive / blocking dialogs that require an explicit
action.

tags.name: hp-dropdown-menu
tags.description:
Dropdown menu — click-triggered popover with menuitem semantics
and arrow-key navigation.

tags.name: hp-menu-item
tags.description:
A single menu item inside hp-dropdown-menu / hp-context-menu.
role="menuitem"; Enter / Space activate; emits hp-menu-select.

attributes.name: value
attributes.description:
Value emitted in hp-menu-select. Defaults to the trimmed text
content if not provided.

attributes.name: disabled
attributes.description: Disabled — blocks activation and removes from focus order.

tags.name: hp-hover-card
tags.description:
Hover- / focus-triggered floating card. Larger and interactive
than hp-tooltip; lighter than hp-popover (no outside-click).

attributes.name: side
attributes.description: Preferred side relative to the trigger.

attributes.name: align
attributes.description: Alignment along the chosen side.

attributes.name: offset
attributes.description: Pixel gap between trigger and card.

attributes.name: open-delay
attributes.description:
Open delay (ms) before showing. Default 400 — long enough to
avoid flashes while skimming, short enough to feel responsive
on intent.

attributes.name: close-delay
attributes.description:
Close delay (ms) before hiding after pointer leaves both the
trigger and the card. Default 300 — gives users time to move
the pointer from trigger to card.

tags.name: hp-popover
tags.description:
Anchored floating panel. Click-triggered; click-outside / Escape
dismiss; focus restoration to the trigger on close.

attributes.name: side
attributes.description: Preferred side relative to the trigger.

attributes.name: align
attributes.description: Alignment along the chosen side.

attributes.name: offset
attributes.description: Pixel gap between trigger and panel. Default 8.

attributes.name: open
attributes.description: Reflect open state. Setting `open` programmatically opens / closes.

tags.name: hp-tooltip
tags.description:
Lightweight tooltip — wraps a trigger element and shows the
slotted `content` on hover / focus. role="tooltip", auto
aria-describedby on the trigger while visible, Escape dismisses.

attributes.name: side
attributes.description: Tooltip side relative to the trigger.

attributes.name: open-delay
attributes.description:
Delay before showing on hover (ms). Default 300. Reduces
flickering when the cursor passes over a trigger.

attributes.name: close-delay
attributes.description: Delay before hiding on mouseleave (ms). Default 100.

tags.name: hp-cell
tags.description:
Universal labelled hex. Subsumes anchor / action / secondary /
utility (interactive), content / support / slot (decorative), and
positive / warn / alert / error (tone overlay) into one element.

attributes.name: variant
attributes.description:
Role + visual preset. Interactive variants
(`anchor|action|secondary|utility`) lift on hover, show the focus
trace, and accept keyboard input via the host's `tabindex`.
Decorative variants (`content|support|slot`) are static.

attributes.name: size
attributes.description:
Cell size.

- `xxs` (20px) — dense inline form-control hex
- `xs` (32px) — comfortable inline form-control hex
- `sm` (100px, default) — content-hex / general UI tile
- `md` (180px, flat-top) — large content tile
- `lg` (320px) — feature tile

Variant-aware auto-defaults apply when `size` isn't set:
`content` → `md`, `support` → `lg`. Form-input components
(hp-checkbox, hp-radio) own their own xs/xxs defaults via
their own `size` attribute.

attributes.name: tone
attributes.description:
Semantic tone overlay. `neutral` (default) leaves variant tokens
untouched; the others swap stroke / label to the matching
semantic colour pair.

attributes.name: active
attributes.description:
When set with a non-neutral tone, fills the hex with the
tone-container colour and flips the label to the on-container
contrast pair. The cell reads as "this state is in effect".

attributes.name: filled
attributes.description:
High-emphasis filled CTA. Meaningful when `variant="action"` —
paints both polygons with `--hp-primary`, label flips to
`--hp-on-primary`.

tags.name: hp-code
tags.description:
Monospaced code block with optional line numbers and per-line
hover highlighting. Syntax highlighting is opt-in via
`HpCode.setHighlighter(...)`.

attributes.name: language
attributes.description: Language hint passed to the tokeniser (e.g. "typescript").

attributes.name: no-line-numbers
attributes.description: Hide the line-number gutter.

tags.name: hp-copy
tags.description: Copy-to-clipboard button.

attributes.name: value
attributes.description: Text to write to the clipboard on click

attributes.name: label
attributes.description: Idle button label (default: "Copy")

attributes.name: copied-label
attributes.description: Label after a successful copy (default: "Copied")

attributes.name: icon-only
attributes.description: Drop the text label and show only the icon

tags.name: hp-hex
tags.description:
SVG hex primitive. Every other hex-shaped atom composes this for
its stencil; size is the only public knob.

attributes.name: size
attributes.description:
Cell size.

- `xxs` (20px) — dense inline form controls
- `xs` (32px) — comfortable inline form controls
- `sm` (100px) — content-hex default
- `md` (180px) — flat-top content hex
- `lg` (320px) — large content hex

tags.name: hp-latex
tags.description:
LaTeX math primitive. Render-only.

The LaTeX source comes from the `value` attribute or the element's
text content (attribute wins when both are present). Consumers
register a renderer once at startup via `HpLatex.setRenderer(...)`.

attributes.name: value
attributes.description: LaTeX source string

attributes.name: block
attributes.description: Switch to block (display) mode (default: inline)

attributes.name: background
attributes.description: Mount an hp-background backdrop (block-mode only)

attributes.name: copyable
attributes.description: Show a copy-source button in the top-right corner (block-mode only)

tags.name: hp-visually-hidden
tags.description:
Visually hidden but accessible — content is read by assistive tech
but doesn't render on screen.

tags.name: hp-badge
tags.description:
Small toned status / count badge. Thin shell over hp-cell content
variant at sm size with an optional tone overlay.

attributes.name: tone
attributes.description:
Semantic tone. Defaults to `neutral` (no tone overlay — uses the
hp-cell content variant tokens).

attributes.name: active
attributes.description:
Fills the badge with the tone-container colour when set.
Reads as "this state is in effect" — see hp-cell's `active`.

tags.name: hp-tag
tags.description:
Dismissable tag / chip. hp-cell content variant + optional × close
button.

attributes.name: tone
attributes.description: Semantic tone — same set as hp-cell.

attributes.name: removable
attributes.description:
Show the dismiss button. Fires `hp-tag-remove` on click /
Enter / Space.

attributes.name: disabled
attributes.description: Disabled — blocks dismiss action and dims the visual.

tags.name: hp-tether
tags.description:
Arc-tether between two distant molecules — curved SVG bezier
connecting two hexes referenced by CSS selector (`from` / `to`).
Reroutes around obstacles, re-settles after drags.

attributes.name: from
attributes.description: CSS selector for the source molecule. Resolved against document.

attributes.name: to
attributes.description: CSS selector for the target molecule. Resolved against document.

attributes.name: state
attributes.description:
`active` (default) shows full-opacity stroke + travelling pulse;
`idle` drops to the container shade and silences the pulse.

attributes.name: directed
attributes.description: Render an arrowhead at the target end for directed graphs.

tags.name: hp-module-handle
tags.description:
Drag handle — a small filled hex used as the grip for moving an
hp-cluster or hp-unfold-list. Pure visual indicator; the parent
drives the actual drag interaction via drag-handle attribute.

attributes.name: active
attributes.description: When set, the handle is currently grabbed — fills with `primary`.

tags.name: hp-unfold-list
tags.description:
Ring-expanding list primitive — click the source to fan slotted
children into a 6-slot ring around it; click outside to close.

attributes.name: open
attributes.description:
Reflected open / closed state. Drives the bloom CSS + the
`aria-pressed` mirror on the source.

attributes.name: unordered
attributes.description:
When set, children land at a randomly-shuffled subset of the 6
ring positions and stagger in random order (both keyed off the
same permutation). Without it, children land in clockwise
spiral order and stagger in that same order. Mirrors the
ordered / unordered semantics of `<ol>` vs `<ul>`.

tags.name: hp-unfold-overlay
tags.description:
Hex-clipped lightbox / modal. Native <dialog> + showModal() under
the hood; the slotted body is clipped to a hex shape with an
animated open / close.

attributes.name: open
attributes.description:
Reflected open / closed state. Setting it imperatively calls
showModal / close on the inner <dialog>.

tags.name: hp-unfold-page
tags.description:
Camera-zoom navigation primitive. Click the source hex (or any
<a data-hp-unfold>) and its colour rapidly expands to cover the
viewport, then the destination page is revealed. View Transitions
API drive the cross-document animation.

attributes.name: href
attributes.description:
Target URL. Must be same-origin for cross-document View
Transitions to engage; cross-origin navigations skip the VT
and just navigate.

attributes.name: preview
attributes.description:
When set, clicking the source plays the expand-and-shrink
animation in place without navigating. The overlay scales up
to viewport coverage, holds, then scales back down. Use for
showcase demos and visual previews.
